summary: Add the M4 conversation state foundation: bounded streaming accumulation, stale-request isolation, fenced-code extraction, and explicit review states for proposed edits.

decisions.decision: Only deltas belonging to the active request may mutate the assistant message, and completion or cancellation closes the streaming state without retaining an active request id.
decisions.rationale: Late provider chunks must not overwrite a newer conversation request, while cancel must leave a stable reviewable transcript.

decisions.decision: Fenced response code is represented as a pending proposal and cannot become accepted or rejected until an explicit review action targets its proposal id.
decisions.rationale: AC-10.b requires apply-as-edit review semantics rather than silent mutation of the editor buffer.

testEvidence.criterion: Conversation tests fail when the reducer is absent and pass for fenced-code extraction, stale-stream isolation, and explicit proposal review.
testEvidence.test: Run the focused conversation suite once against the deliberate missing-module RED state, then against the implementation.

red.outcome: RED: Test Files 1 failed; module ../../../src/application/ai/conversation was not found; exit 1.

green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 3 passed (3); Duration 559ms.

testEvidence.criterion: The new application unit remains type-safe and source-policy clean.
testEvidence.test: Run TypeScript and repository lint/source policy once after implementation.

red.outcome: RED: with conversation.ts deliberately removed, TypeScript reported TS2307 for the conversation test import and exited 2.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; pnpm.cmd lint
green.outcome: GREEN: TypeScript exited 0; Checked 419 files in 242ms with source policy passed.

questions: The reducer does not yet persist conversations, render markdown, or apply accepted proposals to a document. Those remain later C10 UI/runtime units; this entry makes no claim that AC-10.b is fully closed.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
